prestazioni: Engine swap to a 3.6L VR6 (engine code: **CJXB**) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, ARP head studs) and a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile for high-RPM power retention, paired with a **034 Motorsport billet VR6 timing chain tensioner** to prevent timing chain stretch under aggressive driving.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid .63 A/R turbine housing) with a **Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm, dual-port)** and a **Vargas GC Stage 3 VR6 turbo kit** (including a custom 3.5" intercooler piping system with silicone couplers from **Vibrant Performance**). Supporting mods include a **Bosch 044 fuel pump**, **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**, and a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** with flex-fuel capability and launch control.

Drivetrain upgrades: **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily** (organic/copper hybrid disc) with a **Peloquin limited-slip differential (Quaife ATB-style)** for the **02M 6-speed manual transmission**, reinforced with a **034 Motorsport transmission mount insert** and a **Neuspeed short shifter (70mm throw reduction)** for precise shifts. Suspension consists of **KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front springs, 7kg/mm rear)** with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (full subframe, control arms, and trailing arms)** for razor-sharp handling.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2 EOS-specific widebody kit** (FRP construction) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** and **OEM+ color-matched lower valance inserts** (VW Part #5K0071503BGRU). The kit includes aggressive front canards, extended rear quarter panels, and a **custom carbon fiber duckbill spoiler** (fabricated by **Seibon Carbon**) for downforce.

Wheel setup: **BBS RS-GT II 9.5x19" ET35 (front) and 10.5x19" ET40 (rear)** in **Gunmetal with polished lips**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear)**. Brake system features **AP Racing 6-piston calipers (front, 380mm rotors)** and **4-piston calipers (rear, 356mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.

Interior overhaul: **Recaro Sportster CS seats (Schroth 4-point harnesses)** with **custom Alcantara door cards (stitched with red contrast thread)** and a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm, suede)**. The dash is replaced with a **digital AIM MXS Strada 7" dash display** (integrated with the Syvecs ECU) and a **custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in)** from **Custom Cages UK** for structural rigidity and safety.
